LanguageData.AxialTiltTip: How much the planet's axis tilts relative to its orbital plane. Increasing it increases the swinginess of seasonal temperatures at the poles while also increasing their average temperature. Earth-like is 23.45°. 90° is likely to be quite challenging!
LanguageData.SeasonalDampingTip: Decrease the effect of the axial tilt. Lower values compress the effect toward vanilla (k=0.0), while k=1.0 is realistic.
LanguageData.TempRangeTableLabel: Annual Average temperature range (winter low / summer high):
LanguageData.RAT_RealisticPlantRestDesc: Reduces the plant rest period from ~11 hours to 4 hours (22:00–02:00), allowing plants to grow during extended daylight at high latitudes. Recommended with non-Earth axial tilts.
